mapFilters.title: Filters

news.title: Latest News
news.closedBetaDescription: The Closed Beta of Chrono Odyssey took place from June 20 to 22, 2025. PC players via Steam explored the Setera region, testing the combat system and the three available classes. Feedback collected will be used to optimize the game before the official launch.
news.nextStepsDescription: According to the Chrono Studio team, the focus will now be on performance improvements, class balancing, and server optimization. There is no confirmed date yet for the start of the Open Beta or the official launch, but new information should be released soon.
news.trailerDescription: During Summer Game Fest 2025, Chrono Studio revealed a new gameplay trailer showcasing the dynamic combat system, open world exploration, and time manipulation mechanics like Rewind and Stop Time. The trailer is available on the official YouTube channel and Chrono Odyssey's profile on X.

updatedAt: Updated on: 06/26/2025 • Sources: Official Profile on X | Official Website

footer.aboutText: Independent fan-made project designed to organize maps, news, and resources from the Chrono Odyssey universe for the community.
footer.powered: Made with React, TailwindCSS, and support from the gaming community 🐒
footer.copyright: © 2025 Chrono Odyssey Interactive Map — Powered by Serial Healer

aboutPage.title: About the Project
aboutPage.intro: This site was developed to offer an interactive and informative experience for players and enthusiasts of the Chrono Odyssey universe. We understand how vast and full of secrets the world of Setera is — that's why we created an accessible and organized platform to explore everything it has to offer.
aboutPage.feature1: Interactive map with Points of Interest (POIs)
aboutPage.feature5: Clear visual organization to support your journey
aboutPage.transparencyText: This is a fan-made project with no official affiliation to Kakao Games or the game developers. Our goal is to support the community with a useful, trustworthy, and constantly updated platform.
aboutPage.contentNote: All content published here is based on information publicly shared by the official team or community, always with care to ensure accuracy and relevance.
aboutPage.supportText: To keep the project active and free, we discreetly use ads through Google AdSense. No personal information is collected directly by this site.

header.title: Chrono Odyssey Interactive Map - All Setera's Continent Locations

home.mapSubtitle: Explore the Continent of Setera with our Interactive Map.
home.newsSubtitle: Stay updated with the latest game news and Dev Notes.
home.featuresDescription: Our interactive map is the definitive tool for your adventure in Setera. With functional filters and an intuitive sidebar, finding what you need has never been easier. Log in with your Google account and add your own markers directly on the map, sharing your discoveries with the community. With constant updates, we are always adding new locations, quests, and mob drops to ensure you have the most accurate information for your journey.
features: Possibility for the user to add tags (Just log in with your Google account and right click).
Update every 48 hours (There are still many things missing for it to actually become something I envisioned).
Possibility of locating resources dropped from mobs (I have implemented the function and will soon add the respective mobs and their their drops).
Each Chrono Gate is properly named, as are all the Bounty Hunters that were available in the Closed Beta.
New feature: Precise respawn timers for Premium users. See all respawn times for resources, enemies, and bosses IN REAL TIME (Click on the Timer and see exactly where the marker is).
The “Quests” filter has also been added. For now, I've put the location of the cooking quest (which required a spider leg) that some players had trouble finding.
home.gameTitle: Chrono Odyssey - A Next-Generation Action MMORPG
home.gameDescription: Game features include awe-inspiring visuals powered by Unreal Engine 5, a vast and intricately designed seamless open world, dynamic action-based combat mechanics based on time manipulation and extensive customization.

world.title: Seamless Open World
world.desc: A seamless and unrestricted exploration of any terrain is offered by Chrono Odyssey thanks to its open world concept. It also features many many different biomes, including grasslands, snowlands, swamps, and more. The adventure through the world of Chrono Odyssey offers much to explore.

chronotector.title: Chronotector
chronotector.desc: A "Chronotector" is an artifact which allows players to stop time around monsters or rewind a character's time, enabling more dynamic combat. You can explore past generations of the open world before environmental and historical events made sweeping changes to the land of Chrono Odyssey.

dungeons.title: Dungeons & Raiding
dungeons.desc: Party up and clear a variety of dungeons! Chrono Odyssey's end content features challenging dungeons and raids. If you're strong enough, you might even be able to clear these formidable dungeons and raids on your own. You can also look forward to getting rewards for clearing dungeons, group dungeons, and PvP content.

crafting.title: Meaningful Harvesting and Crafting
crafting.desc: Progress and improve the in-game economy by participating in lucrative activities within Chrono Odyssey's vast open world. This includes harvesting, logging, mining, and skinning. You can craft valuable equipment and consumables by acquiring resources from these activities. Additionally, these gameplay elements will foster social interaction and a sense of community, as you engage in trade and collaboration with other players.

customization.title: Character Customization
customization.desc: Customize your character and express your individuality. Characters can be personalized with a wide range of options, including gender, body types, facial features, hairstyles, makeup, scars, and much more - all up to your unique preferences with a high degree of freedom.

premiumTimers.descriptionNonPremium: Unlock precise boss and rare resource timers on the map to optimize your journey.
premiumTimers.noTimersFound: No active timers found at the moment.
